title: SoftBank posts $46 billion gain at Vision Fund driven mainly by massive OpenAI bet
summary: SoftBank recorded a $46 billion annual gain at its Vision Fund, primarily driven by the surging value of its OpenAI investment stake. The windfall demonstrates substantial returns from early backing of the AI company.
content: SoftBank booked a yearly gain of $46 billion at its Vision Fund driven in large part by the huge rise in value of its investment in OpenAI.

zh.title: 软银愿景基金年度收益460亿美元，主要由巨额OpenAI投资驱动
zh.summary: 软银在其愿景基金中录得460亿美元的年度收益，主要由其OpenAI投资股份价值飙升驱动。这笔意外之财展示了早期支持这家AI公司的丰厚回报。

title: What do Japanese crisps have to do with the Iran war?
summary: Calbee, a Japanese crisp manufacturer, is switching to black and white packaging due to disrupted ink supplies caused by the Strait of Hormuz closure linked to geopolitical tensions. The disruption illustrates how Middle East conflicts affect global supply chains.
content: Calbee says it will temporarily switch to black and white packaging as ink supplies have been disrupted by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 日本薯片和伊朗战争有什么关系？
zh.summary: 日本薯片制造商Calbee由于霍尔木兹海峡关闭导致的油墨供应中断而改用黑白包装，该关闭与地缘政治紧张局势有关。这种中断说明了中东冲突如何影响全球供应链。

title: European markets to open higher as focus returns to earnings; Siemens unveils $7 billion buyback
summary: European stocks are expected to open higher Wednesday, reversing Tuesday's negative sentiment as investor focus shifts to corporate earnings. German manufacturing giant Siemens announced a $7 billion share buyback program.
content: European stocks are expected to buck the negative sentiment seen in Tuesday's session by opening higher on Wednesday.

zh.title: 欧洲市场看涨，投资者关注点转向财报；西门子推出70亿美元回购计划
zh.summary: 欧洲股票预计周三高开，扭转周二的负面情绪，因为投资者的关注点转向公司财报。德国制造业巨头西门子宣布了一项70亿美元的股票回购计划。

title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: Starmer’s EU push faces a harsh political reality
summary: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer is focusing on resetting relations with Europe as a strategy to revive declining political popularity. The effort comes as his administration faces domestic political headwinds.
content: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer has alighted on resetting relations with Europe as a way of reviving his flagging popularity.

zh.title: CNBC的英国交易通讯：斯塔默的欧盟推进面临严峻政治现实
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默正专注于重置与欧洲的关系，以此作为扭转政治人气下滑的战略。这一努力进行之际，其政府面临国内政治逆风。

title: Buy these 'cheap' stocks, Barclays says, as luxury's 'self-help stories' pay off
summary: Barclays identifies buying opportunities in luxury stocks that have been depressed by Middle East conflict concerns. The bank believes luxury companies' operational improvements will drive recovery.
content: The conflict in the Middle East has weighed heavily on the world's biggest luxury stocks, but Barclays sees a buying opportunity.

zh.title: 巴克莱表示：买入这些"廉价"股票，因为奢侈品的"自救故事"得到回报
zh.summary: 巴克莱发现了因中东冲突担忧而被压低的奢侈品股票的买入机会。该银行认为奢侈品公司的运营改善将推动复苏。

title: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
summary: Major tech companies are launching smart glasses despite widespread privacy concerns from consumers and advocates. Meta's smart glasses are experiencing strong sales despite the ongoing privacy debate.
content: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.

zh.title: 智能眼镜是"隐私侵犯"——Meta的产品销售却比以往任何时候都好
zh.summary: 尽管消费者和倡导者普遍关切隐私问题，主要科技公司仍在推出智能眼镜。Meta的智能眼镜尽管存在持续的隐私争议，销售仍在强劲增长。

title: Jensen Huang joins Trump's China trip after the U.S. president called the Nvidia CEO
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang has joined President Trump's trip to China after a personal call from the president. His last-minute inclusion highlights the significance of the U.S.-China tech relationship during the summit.
content: The U.S. chipmaker executive was not included in earlier lists of business leaders participating in President Donald Trump's trip to China this week.

zh.title: Jensen Huang在美国总统亲自致电后加入特朗普的中国之行
zh.summary: 英伟达首席执行官Jensen Huang在美国总统亲自致电后加入了特朗普的中国之行。他的临时加入凸显了峰会期间美中科技关系的重要性。

title: Morgan Stanley boosts price targets for China indexes, sees upside through 2Q 2027
summary: Morgan Stanley raised price targets for Chinese stock indexes, projecting upside through the second quarter of 2027. The firm cites China's competitive supply chain advantages in high-end power and green technology sectors.
content: China's highly competitive supply chain also makes the country best positioned in the high-end power and green tech space, the strategists said.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利提高中国指数目标价格，看好至2027年第二季度
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利提高了中国股票指数的目标价格，预计到2027年第二季度将持续上升。该公司指出中国在高端电力和绿色技术领域的供应链竞争优势。

title: For Chinese exporters, Iran worries eclipse tariff woes as Trump, Xi prepare to meet
summary: Chinese exporters are increasingly concerned about Iran instability overshadowing tariff worries ahead of the Trump-Xi summit. Both nations are expected to coordinate efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore regional stability.
content: Heading into the summit, Beijing and Washington will likely reaffirm their shared intention to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore stability in the region.

zh.title: 对于中国出口商来说，伊朗担忧随着特朗普与习近平准备会面而超过了关税担忧
zh.summary: 随着特朗普与习近平峰会的临近，中国出口商越来越担心伊朗不稳定性会掩盖关税问题。两国预计将协调努力重新开放霍尔木兹海峡并恢复地区稳定。

title: Plans for Australia's first Trump Tower scrapped due to 'toxic' brand, developer says
summary: Plans for a 91-storey Trump Tower in Queensland have been abandoned by the developer, who cited the Trump brand as "toxic" for the project. The building would have been Australia's tallest structure.
content: The 91-storey luxury hotel on the Gold Coast in Queensland was meant to be Australia's tallest building.

zh.title: 澳大利亚首座特朗普大厦计划因"有毒"品牌被放弃，开发商表示
zh.summary: 昆士兰州一栋91层高的特朗普大厦计划已被开发商放弃，开发商称特朗普品牌对该项目来说是"有毒的"。这栋建筑本将成为澳大利亚最高的建筑。

title: My retirement fund is like an AI version of me. It keeps working when I’m not able to.
summary: An investor compares automated retirement fund management to AI that works independently. The piece emphasizes the importance of proactive personal financial management. This highlights how technology enables passive wealth building.
content: “Not taking care of your money becomes, in a visceral sense, not taking care of yourself.”

zh.title: 我的退休基金就像我的AI版本。在我无法工作时，它仍在继续运作。
zh.summary: 一位投资者将自动化退休基金管理与独立运作的AI进行比较。这篇文章强调了主动个人财务管理的重要性。这突出了技术如何促进被动财富积累。
